name: Blind Willie Johnson
abstract: Willie Johnson (January 25, 1897 – September 18, 1945), commonly known as Blind Willie Johnson, was an American gospel blues singer and guitarist. His landmark recordings completed between 1927 and 1930, thirty songs in all, display a combination of powerful chest voice singing, slide guitar skills and originality that has influenced gen…

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Morris
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Do you remember many of the guitar players that played sacred songs, spirituals like Blind Willie Johnson? ... [INTERVIEWEE] North of the world. You mean like singing to them spirituality churches?
